changes.reason: P0 website feedback asked how to handle a forgotten Screen Time passcode; existing Screen Time canonical articles cover limits and approval requests, not passcode recovery.

queries: 屏幕使用时间密码忘记了
canonicalReview.notes: The matched articles cover Screen Time limits, Screen Time approval requests, usage reporting, device lock passcodes, and Apple Account sign-in problems. None provide the Apple-documented Screen Time passcode reset flow for self-managed and child devices.
